# Gmail Factory — Hermes vendor slim build
# Installed into /usr/local/lib/gmail-factory/venv by install_gmail_factory.sh.
# Kept lean so subprocess startup is fast and the venv stays under ~200 MB.
#
# Dropped vs upstream ShadowHackrs/Gmail-infinity:
#   selenium, webdriver-manager, beautifulsoup4, free-proxy   -- legacy engine
#   Appium-Python-Client                                      -- mobile engine
#   flask, SpeechRecognition, pydub, waitress                 -- voice OTP server
#   scipy, numpy                                              -- replaced by inlined pydoll math in core/behavior.py

playwright>=1.40.0
playwright-stealth>=1.0.6

requests>=2.31.0
aiohttp>=3.9.0

python-dotenv>=1.0.0

rich>=13.7.0
colorama>=0.4.6

faker>=22.0.0
unidecode>=1.3.7
